extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters Against the Company, By our Company, Against Directors, By our Directors, Against Promoters, and By our Promoters. I counted only Against rows: criminal proceedings are Nil for the Company, Directors and Promoters (0); statutory/regulatory proceedings are Nil (0); tax proceedings against the Company are 8, while tax matters against Directors and Promoters are excluded under the company/subsidiaries-only rule. The quantified aggregate against the Company is ₹72.43 million, with no subsidiary amount separately disclosed, so the litigation aggregate is ₹72.43 million = ₹7.243 crore; all By rows were excluded. Contingent liabilities are disclosed as of March 31, 2024 in ₹ million; no stated Total row is provided, so the four contingent-liability line items, excluding the separate capital commitment, sum to ₹387.94 million = ₹38.794 crore. The top-five customer concentration is company-wide, based on revenue from operations, and is 66.02% for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024; the source unit is ₹ million and conversion to crore uses ₹10 million = ₹1 crore.
